channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: US prepares to deorbit International Space Station amid China competition
item.description: As competition in the new space race ramps up with China, the United States is preparing to deorbit the International Space Station. If a replacement is not ready by 2028, China may become the leader in space.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: US imposes sanctions on Russian and Iranian groups over disinformation targeting American voters
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The United States has imposed sanctions on two groups linked to Iranian and Russian efforts to target American voters with disinformation ahead of this year's election.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 118th Congress was one of the least productive in over 30 years
item.description: The outgoing Congress enacted fewer than 210 bills into law over the last two years, with most enacted in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Elina Shirazi, NewsNation

item.title: DC mayor reports 'great meeting' with Trump after past public feuds, touts 'common ground' on nation's capital
item.description: Washington, D.C., Mayor Muriel Bowser said she met with President-elect Donald Trump to discuss their "shared priorities" for the nation's capital.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The rise in mail voting comes with a price, as mismatched signatures lead to ballot rejections
item.description: The use of mail ballots exploded in 2020 as states looked for ways to accommodate voters during the COVID-19 pandemic.
item.dc:creator: Audrey Mcavoy And Ayanna Alexander, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump calls it the 'center of the universe.' Mar-a-Lago is a magnet for those seeking influence
item.description: PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — The cars begin lining up early in the morning to be screened by Secret Service agents under white tents near the fence that surrounds President-elect Donald Trump’s vast south Florida estate.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON and MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: North Dakota senator's son to serve 28 years in prison for crash that killed deputy
item.description: The son of U.S. Sen. Kevin Cramer, R-N.D., will serve 28 years in prison for killing a Mercer County sheriff's deputy during a crash in December 2023 while fleeing law enforcement.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A guide to funeral services for former President Jimmy Carter
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Funeral services honoring former President Jimmy Carter, who died Sunday at age 100, will be held in Georgia and Washington, D.C., beginning Saturday, Jan. 4, and concluding Thursday, Jan. 9. Here's a list of events, as provided by the Joint Task Force-National Capital Region.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: ICE shuts down programs offering services to illegal immigrants, citing ‘immense’ costs
item.description: Immigration and Customs Enforcement says it has stopped two programs related to service for illegal immigrants as they did not align with the agency's mission.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Army National Guard soldier from Indiana dies in non-combat incident in Iraq
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A 34-year-old soldier serving with the Indiana National Guard in Iraq has died in a non-combat incident, the Army said Monday. Capt. Eric Richard Hart, 34, of Indianapolis, Indiana, died Saturday in Iraq, the Army National Guard said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: TARA COPP, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jimmy Carter is being mourned in his tiny hometown and around the world
item.description: Tributes to former President Jimmy Carter are pouring in from his small hometown of Plains, Georgia, and around the world.
item.dc:creator: Russ Bynum, Sharon Johnson And Bill Barrow, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Fox News Politics Newsletter: Trump's Vote of Confidence
item.description: Welcome to the Fox News Politics newsletter, with the latest updates on the Trump transition, exclusive interviews and more Fox News politics content.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Biden announces nearly $2.5 billion more in military aid for Ukraine
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden said Monday that the United States will send nearly $2.5 billion more in weapons to Ukraine as his administration works quickly to spend all the money it has available to help Kyiv fight off Russia before President-elect Donald Trump takes office.
item.dc:creator: TARA COPP, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: An appeals court upholds a $5 million award in a sexual abuse verdict against President-elect Trump
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A federal appeals court on Monday upheld a jury’s finding in a civil case that Donald Trump sexually abused a columnist in an upscale department store dressing room in the mid-1990s. The 2nd U.S.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER and MICHAEL R. SISAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump endorses Mike Johnson to stay on as House Speaker despite government funding turmoil
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump on Monday endorsed House Speaker Mike Johnson, providing crucial backing for the Louisiana Republican as he prepares for what is expected to be another contentious speakership race this week.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ford Museum will open display honoring Jimmy Carter's life
item.description: After the death of former President Jimmy Carter, the Gerald R. Ford Museum in Grand Rapids is opening a new display to commemorate his life.
item.dc:creator: Anna Skog, NewsNation

item.title: Trump gives complete and total endorsement of Johnson as Speaker
item.description: President-elect Trump offered his complete and total endorsement of Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) on Monday, days before a House vote on Friday to elect a new Speaker. "Speaker Mike Johnson is a good, hard working, religious man. He will do the right thing, and we will continue to WIN.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: A caucus of military veterans seeks to bridge the political divide in a polarized Congress
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The players in this year's Army-Navy football game kept up a long tradition, with each side honoring the other’s school song when the contest ended. It was an acknowledgment that the future could bring moments when the opponents that day are teammates on deadlier fields.
item.dc:creator: GARY FIELDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Carter to be honored with events in Georgia, Washington
item.description: Former President Jimmy Carter will be honored with public observances in both Georgia and Washington, D.C., in the coming days, following his death on Sunday. He will be interred in Plains, Ga., according to the Carter Center.
item.dc:creator: Katie Wadington, NewsNation

item.title: Former President Jimmy Carter dies at 100
item.description: Carter, who served as the 39th president of the United States from 1977 to 1981, died Sunday in Plains, Georgia.
item.dc:creator: NewsNation Staff, NewsNation

item.title: Musk calls some MAGA supporters ‘contemptible fools’ as visa row intensifies
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk labeled a section of President-elect Trump supporters as “contemptible fools” as the online debate around visas for highly skilled workers on the right intensifies.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WFLA, NBC
